positive: A mystical forest scene rendered in highly detailed psychedelic symmetry, featuring geometric megafauna like a stylized deer and celestial elements such as crescent moons and nebulae. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed as an isolated print graphic. Use a vibrant color palette of deep indigo, ethereal turquoise, burnt orange, and muted gold. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco geometry and bioluminescent natural patterns, emphasizing clean, bold silhouettes and high contrast between light and shadow. Intricate linework, perfect mandala composition, vector illustration, suitable for screen printing, highly detailed.
